response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including C++ (though primarily in embedded and lab contexts), SQL, and various other languages. However, his professional experience lacks depth in C++ development on Windows platforms for capital markets or fixed-income systems, and there is no clear evidence of domain expertise in financial services, fixed income, or investment banking. His recent roles focus on full-stack development with TypeScript, Node.js, and other modern frameworks, which do not align with the core requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong C++ experience in embedded and lab environments (National Instruments, robotics)
Professional experience with SQL databases (MongoDB, MySQL, etc.)
Demonstrated ability to work in agile, test-driven environments (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Lacks 5–10 years of professional C++ development experience specifically on Windows platforms for capital markets
No direct experience or domain expertise in fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets systems
Recent career focus shifted away from C++ toward full-stack development with TypeScript/Node.js, JavaScript, and modern web frameworks
